title: Review 6H Géographie: geo56-represent-map
goal: Independently review and, within the same three authorized exercise prefixes, correct the geo56-represent-map construction, practice, and transfer-diagnosis records against the finalized coverage matrix and review rubric. Advance only exercises that fully pass to testing.
acceptance: All three designs and prototypes are reviewed against curriculum traceability, year-band honesty, learning-loop completeness, content correctness, French clarity, concept-led diversity, and the approved scope.
All blocking and high findings inside the authorized exercise folders are fixed; no finding is hidden by weakening metadata, acceptance language, or the quality contract.

Automated browser evidence passes for each prototype across its full incorrect-feedback, retry, correct-continuation, and completion path using desktop keyboard and touch in an actual 320px viewport, with storage/network monitoring through completion; the reviewer also manually inspects pointer behavior, focus visibility/order, non-color cues, reduced motion, and French feedback quality.
The three lenses remain pedagogically distinct and collectively cover the cluster statement mappings without turning end-of-cycle expectations into 6H requirements.
Only records that pass every testing-readiness criterion are changed from prototyping to testing; none are marked validated, promoted, or connected to classroom persistence.
DESIGN.md findings append a dated independent-review entry and preserve remaining pupil-testing hypotheses.
The catalog validates with all three prototypes discoverable.
must_ask_if: A blocking finding cannot be fixed inside the three declared exercise prefixes.
The coverage matrix or quality contract is contradictory, missing, or would need to be weakened.
An exercise needs to be archived, replaced, or materially changes its approved objective or cluster boundary.
A decision involves credentials, destructive changes, copyrighted content, persistence, new dependencies, or files outside the declared areas.
verify: cd experiments && SMOKE_EXERCISES=EX-0318,EX-0319,EX-0320 npm run test:smoke
